security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob:; connect-src ipc: https://ipc.localhost http://ipc.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'
